title: Chrysodracon hawaiiensis
taxonomy: Chrysodracon hawaiiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is native to Hawaii and is a member of the genus Chrysodracon. The species is also known as Chrysodracon hawaiiensis, which is a synonym for Dracopis hawaiiensis. The classification of the plant places it within the order Asparagales. Chrysodracon hawaiiensis is an endemic plant species found only in the Hawaiian Islands.
